title: Before and now
subtitle: Describe change over time.
overview: Use antes and ahora to compare your life.
This is excellent A2 speaking practice.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Before I lived... now I live...
Before I could not... now I can...

items.es: Antes estudiaba muy poco, pero ahora estudio todos los días.
items.en: Before I studied very little, but now I study every day.

items.es: Antes no podía entender audio rápido.
items.en: Before I could not understand fast audio.

items.es: Ahora puedo entender la idea principal.
items.en: Now I can understand the main idea.

items.es: Antes vivía cerca de mi familia; ahora vivo lejos.
items.en: Before I lived near my family; now I live far away.

items.es: He cambiado mi rutina porque quiero mejorar.
items.en: I have changed my routine because I want to improve.
